title: pterocarpus javanicus
intro: Pterocarpus javanicus, also known as the Javan Kari or Java Kari, is a species of tree native to Indonesia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pterocarpus javanicus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Pterocarpus javanicus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a powder or paste.
